headline: How The Lam Research (LRCX) Story Is Shifting With New Analyst Targets And Risks
summary: Lam Research sits in the spotlight after a series of analyst price target changes, with individual moves ranging from US$6 to US$105 per share. These shifts come as research firms reassess wafer fab equipment demand, earnings potential and how much investors might be willing to pay. This is highlighted by actions such as BofA adding Lam Research to its US 1 List, while others maintain more cautious stances. As you read on, you will see how these evolving targets shape the broader story and...
